name: Frederic C. Schultz
background: Runs under the hashtag #Fred4CA. Describes government as committing murders and unconstitutional acts.
statement: Please elect me governor, to save our rights/lives. We're in an Emergency: I'll declare a State of Emergency, to save us! Murderous government thugs kill us daily, for the 'crimes' of seeking asylum, documenting attacks, protesting. California arrests 800,000 annually, most for unconstitutional victimless/consensual 'crimes', enslaving 200,000 daily, without telling jurors we can always vote 'not guilty'. 'Drug' prohibition/regulation causes trillions in medical costs, murders, poverty worldwide, making millions refugees, torturing sick people to death. Millions Americans homeless, half destitute. We'll tax 5% wealth over $10,000,000 and income over $1,000,000, yielding $1,100,000,000,000 annually, retroactively even. Rent freeze! No lockdowns or forced vaccinations: optional and real food instead! I support school choice and oppose reverse discrimination: equal opportunity instead. We'll increase California State Guard from 900 to 2,000,000, one per classroom, stopping most murders, including by ICE nationwide, preventing martial law, closing slavery/death camps, pardoning innocent slaves! We'll enforce bodily autonomy rights, to abortion, assisted suicides and guns. Human rights to housing ($10,000 homes), living wages, jobs, income, higher/trade education, healthcare (nationwide), food (worldwide), childcare, public transport without deadly high speed trains. Free utilities/gasoline, but save environment. We'll ban pesticides, factory farms, 'autonomous' vehicles. No sales taxes or income taxes under $100,000! We'll enforce our rights to democracy: Equal vote and chance to serve (publicly financed elections). Privacy rights: No mass surveillance, 'Flock' spying cameras.

positions.economy: 5% wealth tax over $10M; no income/sales taxes under $100k; rent freeze; living wages; free utilities and gasoline
positions.healthcare: End drug prohibition; end forced vaccination; bodily autonomy; free healthcare
positions.education: School choice; free higher/trade education; free childcare
positions.environment: Ban pesticides and factory farms; save environment
positions.publicSafety: End unconstitutional arrests; drug decriminalization; expand State Guard; ban autonomous vehicles
positions.government: Publicly financed elections; no mass surveillance; bodily autonomy rights
